description_long: This is a single-family detached house with a red gable roof and cream-colored exterior walls. The front features a small porch with a white door, flanked by two large bushes and a manicured lawn, bordered by a short white fence. The driveway leads up to the house, providing access for vehicles, and the property is surrounded by lush green hedges and several mature trees. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with a small dormer window above the entryway. The rear and sides of the house are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The overall design is compact and suburban, with a focus on privacy and greenery.
description: A cream-colored suburban house with a red gable roof, front porch, driveway, and lush landscaping including hedges and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entry porch, white door, symmetrical windows, driveway, and prominent landscaping with bushes and trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain cream wall, red gable roof, and surrounding hedges and trees, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with the porch, entry door, and lawn visible, framed by large bushes and a single tree in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the gable roof, cream wall, and dense greenery on both sides, with a glimpse of the backyard area.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small porch, bordered by bushes and a short white fence, no columns or overhang.
